hero.title: AI for Massage Therapist
hero.description: Your virtual assistant handles bookings, reminders, and notes, so you can focus on delivering care, not admin.

stats.label: Less time on scheduling and note-taking, more time with clients.
Follow-up tracking and reminders help maintain regular sessions.

intro.title: AI Virtual Receptionist for Massage Therapists

blocks.heading: Simplify and Modernize Your Massage Practice
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we know how busy massage therapists can be between back-to-back appointments. Our AI Virtual Receptionist is designed to take care of your phone calls, bookings, and client inquiries — so you can focus entirely on delivering a relaxing, professional experience.

blocks.heading: More Time for Clients, Less Time on the Phone
blocks.description: Our AI Receptionist works like your personal front desk assistant — answering every call, explaining services, handling bookings, and sending appointment reminders. Whether you're with a client or the clinic is closed, your AI receptionist ensures no message or potential booking slips through.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Client Opportunity Again
blocks.description: Even when you're busy giving treatments, your AI Receptionist keeps your business moving. It can discuss available services like relaxation, remedial, or deep tissue massage, provide accurate pricing and duration details, and confirm bookings instantly. You'll never lose a client because of a missed call again.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subtitle: Streamline your practice with intelligent automation that enhances patient care and reduces administrative burden.

cards.title: Automated Scheduling
cards.description: Session scheduling, reminders, and follow-ups handled automatically, reducing no-shows and improving patient adherence.

cards.title: Organized Records
cards.description: Record massage details, focus areas, and client preferences in seconds.

cards.title: Stronger Client Retention
cards.description: Regular follow-ups encourage ongoing wellness sessions.

cards.title: Smooth Client Communication
cards.description: Your clients are always greeted with warmth and professionalism — no waiting or voicemail frustration.

cards.title: More Care
cards.description: Spend less time on admin and more time delivering relaxation and therapy.

cards.title: Build Client Loyalty
cards.description: Provide a seamless, responsive experience that encourages repeat bookings and 5-star reviews.

cards.title: Custom-Fitted for Your Clinic
cards.description: We personalize the assistant's tone, vocabulary, and booking flow to match your massage brand and service list.

cards.title: Affordable and Consistent
cards.description: Enjoy 24/7 coverage for a low monthly cost — reliable, accurate, and always available.

cards.title: Hands-Free Admin
cards.description: Let the AI manage calls, bookings, cancellations, and reminders so you can focus on your work.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Massage Therapists Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by massage therapists across Australia to save time, reduce admin, and improve professionalism. It integrates with your booking system, handles calls gracefully, and keeps your clients informed 24/7. Let our AI take care of reception — so you can focus on relaxation, recovery, and results for your clients.

card.heading: Streamlined Client Notes and Follow-Ups
card.description: After each appointment, massage therapists can record short voice memos that are automatically transcribed and summarized, add treatment notes, and upload client records or documents. All information is organized securely in your dashboard, making it easy to track sessions, manage follow-ups, and deliver a personalized client experience.

items.title: Stress Relief Management
items.description: Help clients reduce stress, anxiety, and tension through regular massage sessions.

items.title: Pain & Injury Recovery
items.description: Support healing from muscle strain, stiffness, or sports-related injuries.

items.title: Wellness & Relaxation
items.description: Enhance overall wellbeing, relaxation, and sleep quality.

items.title: Patient Progress Tracking
items.description: Record personalized notes and monitor treatment effectiveness over time.

items.title: AI Assistant
items.description: Answer common patient inquiries via AI chat or voice assistant.
